title: BackupResult
description: Output of `prevail vault backup --json`. Describes a completed backup archive of the vault (or a single domain).

ok.description: True if the backup completed successfully.

archive_path.description: Absolute path to the written archive (e.g. a .tar.gz), or null on failure.

domains.description: Domain names included in the archive.

file_count.description: Number of files written into the archive.

bytes.description: Compressed size of the archive in bytes.

created_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when the archive was created.

error.description: Error message when ok=false, otherwise null/absent.
